title: Dog Nail Grinder Upgraded - Professional 3-Speed Super Quiet and Low Vibration Electric Pet Nail Grinder with 4 LED Lights - Painless Paws Grooming & Smoothing for Small to Large Dogs (Black)
features: 【LED Display Screen】: The LED display screen helps you monitor the battery level and the speed setting, which frees you from power anxiety.
【One and Only 4 LED Lights】: With 4 LED lights on top, you could detect your puppy's blood vessels clearly which can avoid hurting your baby.

【3 Speed Switch & Grinding Ports】: IREDOON dog nail trimmer boasts a 3-speed switch and 3 grinding ports, which allows pet owners to adjust the speed and grinding settings based on their pet's size and nail hardness.

【Low Noise & Safe】: IREDOON Pet Dog Nail Grinder is equipped with advanced whisper-quiet technology, ensuring a noise level of 40db and reducing the risk of pets getting scared or anxious during the trimming process.

【Exceptional Customer Service】: IREDOON stands by the quality of its products and is pleased to offer a free 18-month warranty. Feel free to leave us a message and make your professional suggestions, we are happy to serve you around the clock!
